title: Miconia herincquiana
taxonomy: Miconia herincquiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to Ecuador. As a member of the Melastomataceae family, Miconia herincquiana is closely related to other plants in the same family, which are often found in tropical regions. The Melastomataceae family is part of the larger order Myrtales, which includes a diverse range of flowering plants. This classification places Miconia herincquiana within the broader context of flowering plant evolution and diversity.
